question_title: Will the community prediction be higher than 35.00% on 2026-04-25 for the Metaculus question "Will the United States attempt to occupy or blockade Kharg Island during 2026?"?
summary: This meta-prediction asks whether the Metaculus CP on the Kharg Island occupation/blockade question will exceed 35% on April 25. The CP is currently exactly at 35% (April 13 snapshot), right at the knife-edge threshold. Key developments since the snapshot: (1) US-Iran peace talks collapsed in Islamabad after 21 hours on April 11-12, (2) the US announced and began implementing a naval blockade of Iranian ports that explicitly includes Kharg Island as one of six targeted ports on April 12-13, (3) military preparations for a potential amphibious operation on Kharg Island are underway with analysts citing April 16-17 as an optimal window, and (4) the ceasefire expires around April 22-25 with no extension plan. The CP declined from 75% to 35% primarily due to the ceasefire agreement — now that the ceasefire talks have failed and the blockade has begun, conditions are more escalatory than when CP was at 50%. I estimate ~73% probability the CP rises above 35% by April 25.

factors.description: US naval blockade announced Apr 12-13 includes Kharg Island as one of six targeted Iranian ports. CENTCOM and Trump have publicly stated this. Whether this meets the specific 'blockaded Kharg Island' resolution language is ambiguous.

Peace talks collapsed after 21 hours in Islamabad on Apr 11-12. Mediators still working on new round before Apr 21, but no confirmed plan. Removes the main de-escalation catalyst that drove CP from 50% to 35%.

Active military preparations for potential amphibious operation on Kharg Island (3,500 Marines on USS Tripoli, 82nd Airborne, SEAL teams). Multiple analysts cite Apr 16-17 as optimal window. If this happens, underlying question resolves YES.
Ceasefire expires ~Apr 22-25, around or before the Apr 25 resolution date. No extension agreed. Expiry without deal would push CP higher as military action resumes.
CP was at 35% on Apr 13, same day blockade was implemented. 96 forecasters have 12 days to update in response to blockade news and escalation.
Strong downward CP trend: 75% → 73% → 50% → 35% over 3 weeks. 96 forecasters have been tracking closely. Some escalation may already be priced in at a low resolution probability.
Possible new negotiation round materializing before Apr 21. Egypt, Pakistan, Turkey coordinating. Could keep CP suppressed if talks resume.

Interpretation ambiguity: Resolution requires official statement specifically about 'blockading Kharg Island', not just inclusion in broader port blockade. Smart forecasters may have already factored this in.

reasoning:
**Forecast: 0.73 (73% probability that CP > 35% on April 25)**

Key reasoning:
- The CP sits exactly at the 35% threshold as of April 13, right when major escalatory developments occurred
- The naval blockade (announced April 12-13) explicitly includes Kharg Island among six targeted ports — this happened the same day as the CP snapshot, so forecasters likely haven't fully updated
- Peace talks collapsed on April 11-12, reversing the ceasefire-driven de-escalation that brought CP from 50% to 35%
- Active amphibious operation preparations (Marines, 82nd Airborne) with analysts citing an April 16-17 window
- The ceasefire expires around April 22-25, overlapping with the resolution date
- Main downside risk: the 96 forecasters may have already priced in escalation scenarios at low probability of meeting the specific resolution criteria language

resolution_criteria: This question will resolve based on the community prediction of the Metaculus question found [here](https://www.metaculus.com/questions/42616) (i.e. the 'target question'). If the community prediction of the target question on 2026-04-25 17:48:39 is higher than 35.00%, this question will resolve to 'Yes'. If it is lower or equal to 35.00%, this question will resolve to 'No'. If the target question has already resolved before this question opens, then this question will be annulled. If the target question resolves after this question opens, but before 2026-04-25 17:48:39, then this question will resolve to the same value as the target question.
